name: Favorite Levels
description: Adds a Favorite Levels page to the main menu and lets you auto-backup the favorites list.

auto-backup-enabled.name: Enable Auto Backup
auto-backup-enabled.description: Automatically writes backups of your favorite levels list to the mod save folder.

auto-backup-interval-minutes.name: Backup Interval (Minutes)
auto-backup-interval-minutes.description: Minimum number of minutes between automatic backup writes.

auto-backup-keep-count.name: Backups to Keep
auto-backup-keep-count.description: How many old backup files should be preserved before the oldest ones are pruned.
